arts.ttl: Four players who turned on Jose Mourinho after Chelsea exit
arts.sum: Former Chelsea manager Jose Mourinho is not one to hold back in his thoughts, either when speaking about players in public or speaking privately. Here’s a look at what just four previous Blues players have said about their relationship with the manager, with it mainly leading to their exits from Stamford Bridge.

arts.sum: Chelsea’s multi-club model is partially to blame, with the success of Liam Rosenior’s Strasbourg outfit jeopardising the prospects of Todd Boehly’s side from playing in the competition. Chelsea ’s prospects of playing in the 2025/26 Champions League were dealt a blow on Friday as the possibility of a ban from the competition by UEFA came closer to reality.
